iotevents.detectormodel.sqs.Payload.Docs: You can configure the action payload when you send a message to an Amazon SQS queue.

iotevents.detectormodel.sqs.QueueUrl.Docs: The URL of the SQS queue where the data is written.

iotevents.detectormodel.sqs.UseBase64.Docs: Set this to TRUE if you want the data to be base-64 encoded before it is written to the queue. Otherwise, set this to FALSE.
